file_insights.lib/features/auth/presentation/widgets/a: New file created containing AuthErrorBanner and AuthErrorDisplay widgets for consistent error handling across auth screens
file_insights.lib/features/auth/infrastructure/service: New file created providing AuthErrorHandler service for error categorization and messaging
file_insights.lib/features/auth/domain/providers/auth_: Added authErrorHandlerProvider to dependency injection setup
file_insights.lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/l: Enhanced with AuthErrorBanner integration, error state management, and improved error handling
file_insights.lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/s: Enhanced with AuthErrorBanner integration, error state management, and improved error handling
file_insights.lib/features/auth/presentation/screens/f: Enhanced with AuthErrorBanner integration and improved error handling

patterns_discovered.Error Handling Pattern: Consistent pattern of using _currentError state variable with AuthErrorBanner widget across all auth screens
patterns_discovered.State Management Pattern: Using Riverpod's ref.listen() for auth state changes and local setState() for UI error state
patterns_discovered.Widget Architecture Pattern: Reusable AuthErrorBanner widget with dismiss functionality and onDismiss callback
patterns_discovered.Error Recovery Pattern: Clear error state management with _clearError() methods and error dismissal functionality

gotchas_discovered: Previous implementation used basic SnackBar for errors - replaced with more sophisticated AuthErrorBanner for better UX
Error handling was scattered across different screens - now centralized through AuthErrorHandler service
AuthException objects created dynamically from error messages for consistent error object structure
Error state management required careful handling with mounted checks to prevent memory leaks
discoveries.approach_outcome: Successfully implemented comprehensive error enhancement for all auth screens using a centralized approach. The solution includes reusable error display components, proper error categorization through AuthErrorHandler, and consistent user experience with dismissible error banners. All three auth screens now feature improved error display with actionable recovery options and clean visual design.
recommendations: Consider implementing error analytics tracking in AuthErrorHandler to monitor common error types
Add error retry functionality for network-related errors in AuthErrorBanner widget
Implement error history feature to help users track previous authentication issues
Consider adding accessibility features for error messages (screen reader support)
Implement error caching to provide faster feedback for repeated error conditions
